items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 18 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Inkling: Our open-weights model」、「OpenAI wants developers to stop typing commands and start using a joystick to control their AI agents」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
